calcofi_bird_mammal_census.description: Bird and mammal observations along CalCOFI (and NMFS, CPR) cruise transects, 1987-2021. Transect effort + counts + species/behavior lookups. Curated via CCE-LTER DataZoo 255 (PI Bill Sydeman).

calcofi_bottle.description: Hydrographic bottle data including temperature, salinity, oxygen, nutrients, pigments, and C14 from CalCOFI cruises.

calcofi_ctd-cast.description: CTD downcast profiles with temperature, salinity, oxygen, fluorescence, and other sensors at standard depths.
calcofi_ctd-cast.citation_main: CalCOFI. (2023). CalCOFI CTD Cast Files. CalCOFI.org.

calcofi_dic.description: Discrete profile dissolved inorganic carbon (DIC) and total alkalinity (TA) from CalCOFI Niskin bottle samples, quality-controlled using WOCE flagging.
calcofi_dic.citation_main: Keeling, C.D.; Lueker, T.J.; Emanuele, G.; Dickson, A.G.; Martz, T.R.; Wolfe, W.H.; Mau, A. (2025). Discrete profile dissolved inorganic carbon, total alkalinity, water temperature and salinity measurements for CalCOFI (NCEI Accession 0301029). NOAA NCEI. https://doi.org/10.25921/3w9f-jd72

calcofi_phyllosoma.description: Spiny lobster (Panulirus interruptus) phyllosoma larvae counts by developmental stage from CalCOFI net tows, 1951-2008. Source: EDI knb-lter-cce.188.4 (Koslow).

calcofi_phytoplankton.description: Abundance and species composition of phytoplankton (385 taxonomic categories) in the California Current, 1996-2022, by inverted-microscope counts (E. Venrick). Samples from the near-surface "second depth" are pooled across stations into four regions (NE, SE, Alley, Offshore; Hayward & Venrick 1998) before counting, so the grain is cruise x region, not per-station. Source: EDI knb-lter-cce.254.4.

cce-lter_euphausiids.description: Euphausiid (krill) abundance from CalCOFI / CCE-LTER net tows, 1951-2019, one row per tow. Provisional pending provider answers on abundance units and taxonomic scope (see Questions for Data Providers).

cce-lter_zoodb.description: Holoplankton abundance and carbon biomass by 33 higher taxa (copepods to family, plus amphipods, chaetognaths, salps, pyrosomes, pteropods, ostracods, foraminifera, radiolaria and more) from CalCOFI net tows, 1951-2021, enumerated by microscopy (Ohman Lab / SIO Pelagic Invertebrate Collection). One row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type); unpooled tows are station-resolved, pooled samples are per-cruise regional composites. Raw (uncorrected) abundance per 1000 m3 and per m2, plus biomass mg C/m2.
cce-lter_zoodb.pi_names: Mark D. Ohman; Bertha Lavaniegos; Linsey Sala

cce-lter_zooscan.description: Zooplankton abundance, carbon biomass, and size (Feret diameter, individual carbon content) from ZooScan optical imaging of CalCOFI / CCE-LTER PRPOOS net tows on lines 80, 87 and 90, 2005-present, machine-classified into 23 bioclasses (copepod groups, euphausiids, chaetognaths, appendicularians, salps, doliolids, pteropods, rhizaria and more). One row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type); per-station tows. Source: SIO Ocean Informatics ZooScan portal (Ohman Lab; interface by Marina Frants).

pic_zooplankton.description: Zooplankton net-tow sample registry from the SIO Pelagic Invertebrate Collection, filtered to the CalCOFI region. Position, time, depth, and gear metadata per tow. Biovolume measurements are not in the source file and are pending from the provider (see Questions for Data Providers).
pic_zooplankton.link_data_source: SIO Pelagic Invertebrate Collection DB (CSV export)
pic_zooplankton.pi_names: Rasmus Swalethorp; Ed Weber; Linsey Sala

swfsc_cufes.description: Continuous Underway Fish Egg Sampler (CUFES) egg counts (sardine, anchovy, jack mackerel, hake, squid, other) with underway environmental conditions, from CalCOFI cruises (1996-present). Source: NOAA CoastWatch ERDDAP erdCalCOFIcufes.

swfsc_ichthyo.description: Ichthyoplankton (fish eggs and larvae) collected by bongo and manta net tows on CalCOFI cruises, processed by SWFSC.
swfsc_ichthyo.citation_main: NOAA Fisheries SWFSC. CalCOFI Ichthyoplankton Database.

bird_mammal_transect.description_md: One row per survey transect segment (effort): position, time, dimensions, and bottom depth. Bird/mammal counts join from bird_mammal_observation on gis_key.

bird_mammal_observation.description_md: Bird and mammal counts per transect segment: one row per (transect, species, behavior). count is the measurement; species_code -> bird_mammal_species, behavior_code -> bird_mammal_behavior.

bird_mammal_species.description_md: Species lookup for the census: 4-letter species_code with common/scientific name, ITIS id, and bird/mammal/fish flags.

bird_mammal_behavior.description_md: Behavior-code lookup for the census observations.

bottle.description_md: water sample identity and context at specific depths; measurements pivoted to bottle_measurement

bottle_measurement.description_md: long-format measurement values pivoted from bottle table

cast_condition.description_md: long-format environmental/meteorological conditions pivoted from casts table

casts.description_md: station-level cast metadata including location and integrated measurements; environmental conditions pivoted to cast_condition

grid.description_md: CalCOFI survey grid polygons with standard and historical station patterns

measurement_type.description_md: reference table for CTD measurement types with units and descriptions

ctd_cast.description_md: cast-level metadata for CalCOFI CTD profiles; measurements pivoted to ctd_measurement

ctd_measurement.description_md: long-format sensor readings pivoted from wide CTD profile data

ctd_thin.description_md: adaptively-thinned ctd_measurement: single cast direction, canonical measurement types, ~10 m depth grid with inflection points preserved (see Measurement Frequency section); headline table — full ctd_measurement is supplemental

ctd_summary.description_md: summary statistics per station/depth/measurement_type across cast directions

ctd_wide.description_md: wide-format CTD profile — one column per measurement type (supplemental output for ERDDAP; not part of normalized release). Column definitions follow the CalCOFI CTD+Bottle CSV column format (Sep 2015).

dic_sample.description_md: DIC and total alkalinity measurements from Niskin bottle samples, NCEI accession 0301029

phyllosoma_tow.description_md: One row per net tow with spiny lobster (Panulirus interruptus) phyllosoma larvae sampling: position, time, depth, volume filtered, aliquot. Counts by developmental stage are pivoted to phyllosoma_measurement.

phyllosoma_measurement.description_md: Phyllosoma larvae counts per tow in long form: measurement_type = total or developmental stage (1-11), measurement_value = count.

phyto_sample.description_md: One row per pooled regional sample: a (cruise x region) composite. Venrick CalCOFI phytoplankton are pooled across stations into 4 regions (NE/SE/Alley/Offshore; Hayward & Venrick 1998) before counting, so there is no per-station position — latitude/longitude are the region-centroid (provisional, see questions Q01).

phyto_measurement.description_md: Phytoplankton abundance in long form: one row per (sample, taxon). measurement_type = phytoplankton_abundance, measurement_value = cells/L (provisional units, Q02). Group-SUM rows from the source are derivable from taxa and excluded (Q03).

phyto_taxon.description_md: Taxon lookup keyed by the source species_code (Venrick code), with verbatim taxa group + species and a best-effort WoRMS aphia_id (partial; phytoplankton are poorly covered, Q05).

region.description_md: The 4 pooled regions defined on the CalCOFI grid (Hayward & Venrick 1998), with member station codes and a provisional centroid (Q01).

euphausiids_tow.description_md: One row per euphausiid net tow: position, time, and cruise/ship/site keys. The Abundance measurement is pivoted into euphausiids_measurement. Source: CCE-LTER euphausiid abundance time series (data.csv).

zoodb_sample.description_md: One row per zooplankton sample. source='unpooled' is a single night/day net tow with full position (line/station/site_key, lat/lon, datetime, depth, net type); source='pooled' is a per-cruise regional composite of n_tows_pooled night tows (Lavaniegos & Ohman 2007) with no per-station position. Unpooled tows resolve ship_key/cruise_key/site_key/grid_key against the shared CalCOFI reference tables; pooled samples carry only cruise_key + region. Source: ZooDB holoplankton export (oceaninformatics.ucsd.edu/zoodb), pooled=combined.

zoodb_measurement.description_md: Holoplankton abundance and biomass in long form: one row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type). measurement_type is zooplankton_abundance (count/1000m3), zooplankton_abundance_areal (count/m2), or zooplankton_biomass_carbon (mg C/m2). A row's presence means the taxon was analyzed for that sample; measurement_value=0 means analyzed-but-absent. Coverage varies by taxon/cruise (Ohman & Smith 1995) — missing (sample, taxon) combinations are NOT analyzed, not zeros.

zoodb_taxon.description_md: Higher-taxon lookup for the 33 enumerated holoplankton groups, with the verbatim ZooDB label, a taxon_slug join key, and the WoRMS-resolved aphia_id + accepted scientific name, rank, and kingdom..family classification. Counts are aggregated to this higher-taxon level (all genera/species and phases/stages combined).

zooscan_sample.description_md: One row per ZooScan PRPOOS net-tow sample: a station occupation on a CalCOFI/CCE-LTER cruise (lines 80, 87, 90), 2005-present, with position, time, day/night, and resolved cruise/ship/site keys. Samples were optically imaged with a ZooScan and machine-classified. Source: SIO Ocean Informatics ZooScan portal PRPOOS plot CGI (oceaninformatics.ucsd.edu/zooscandb), per-station values.

zooscan_measurement.description_md: ZooScan imaging metrics in long form: one row per (sample, taxon, measurement_type). measurement_type is zooscan_abundance (No./m2), zooscan_biomass_carbon (mgC/m2), zooscan_feret_diameter (mm, mean organism size), or zooscan_carbon_individual (ugC per individual). measurement_value=0 means the class was imaged-but-absent at that sample.

zooscan_taxon.description_md: Image-classification lookup for the 23 ZooScan PRPOOS bioclasses, with the verbatim class name, a taxon_slug join key, and a best-effort WoRMS aphia_id + accepted name/rank/classification. Four classes are non-taxonomic operational categories (eggs, multiples, nauplii, others) and two are combined groups (cnidaria_ctenophores, pteropoda_heteropoda); see taxon_note.

zooplankton_tow.description_md: One row per zooplankton net tow (parent-net-tow registry) from the SIO Pelagic Invertebrate Collection, filtered to the CalCOFI region. Position, time, depth, and gear metadata. Biovolume measurements are NOT in the source file (see questions Q01) and will be added as zooplankton_measurement when provided.

cufes_sample.description_md: One row per Continuous Underway Fish Egg Sampler (CUFES) sample: position, time, and underway environmental conditions (temperature, salinity, wind, pump). Egg counts are pivoted to cufes_measurement.

cufes_measurement.description_md: Fish/squid egg counts per CUFES sample in long form (measurement_type = taxon eggs, measurement_value = count).

ichthyo.description_md: Consolidated tidy table of ichthyoplankton observations from egg, egg_stage, larva, larva_stage, and larva_size source tables

invert.description_md: number of invertebrates from net tow by species

lookup.description_md: Unified vocabulary lookup table for egg stages, larva stages, and tow types

segment.description_md: Line segments between consecutive sites along a cruise track

site.description_md: unique location (longitude, latitude) and time along cruise

species.description_md: unique species (or taxa) found in egg or larva net tows

taxa_rank.description_md: Lookup table mapping taxonomic rank names to sort order

taxon.description_md: Taxonomic hierarchy for species via WoRMS and ITIS authorities (built from spp.duckdb via recursive CTEs)

cruise_summary.description_md: Per-cruise rollup with year/month/ship and counts of sites sampled across ichthyo bottle CTD and DIC. Built in release_database.qmd from cruise + ship and site/casts/ctd_cast/dic_sample. Used by the CalCOFI cruises Shiny app.

_spatial.description_md: Geometries for ancillary spatial layers (CA jurisdictions NOAA boundaries marine protected areas etc.) keyed by layer + feature_id. Sourced from metadata/spatial_layers.csv. Companion to _spatial_attr.

_spatial_attr.description_md: Non-geometry attributes for features in _spatial in long form (layer feature_id attr_name attr_value). Allows attribute schemas to differ across layers without column proliferation.

bird_mammal_observation.observation_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per transect/species/behavior).

bird_mammal_species.is_bird.description_md: TRUE if the taxon is a bird.

bird_mammal_species.is_mammal.description_md: TRUE if the taxon is a mammal.

bird_mammal_species.is_fish.description_md: TRUE if the taxon is a fish.

bird_mammal_species.is_large_bird.description_md: TRUE if classified as a large bird.

bird_mammal_species.is_unidentified.description_md: TRUE if the record is unidentified to species.

bird_mammal_transect.gis_key.description_md: Transect-segment identifier; primary key. Joins observations.

bird_mammal_transect.cruise_label.description_md: Source cruise label (e.g. CAC1987_05); cruise_key derived from it.

bird_mammal_transect.time_sec.description_md: Time of day in seconds (local); combined with date into datetime_start_utc.

bird_mammal_transect.latitude.description_md: Latitude of the transect-segment midpoint, WGS84.

bird_mammal_transect.longitude.description_md: Longitude of the transect-segment midpoint, WGS84.

bird_mammal_transect.bottom_depth_m.description_md: Seafloor depth at the segment (negative = below sea level in source).

bird_mammal_transect.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Survey date-time, built from date + time_sec (local tz unconfirmed; see questions).

bird_mammal_transect.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key, best-effort from cruise_label + date (no ship column; see questions).

bird_mammal_transect.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid-cell key from spatial join of the midpoint.

bottle.cast_id.description_md: Cast Count - All CalCOFI casts ever conducted, consecutively numbered

bottle.bottle_id.description_md: Bottle Count - All CalCOFI bottles ever sampled, consecutively numbered

bottle.depth_key.description_md: Uses the Cast_ID prefix but adds three additional variables: [Depth][Bottle]-[Rec_Ind]

bottle.btl_num.description_md: Niskin bottle sample was collected from

bottle.rec_ind.description_md: Record Indicator (quality code that applies to the whole bottle, instead of just to a specific parameter)

bottle.inc_tim.description_md: Elapsed incubation time of the primary productivity experiment

bottle_measurement.bottle_measurement_id.description_md: PK: auto-increment integer assigned via ROW_NUMBER(ORDER BY bottle_id, measurement_type)

cast_condition.cast_condition_id.description_md: PK: auto-increment integer assigned via ROW_NUMBER(ORDER BY cast_id, condition_type)

casts.cast_id.description_md: Cast Count - All CalCOFI casts ever conducted, consecutively numbered

casts.sta_code.description_md: Station Designation (See Station_ID and 0-St_Code for codes)

casts.distance.description_md: Nautical miles from coast intercept, calculated from estimated latitude and longitude

casts.ac_line.description_md: Calculated actual line from observed latitude and longitude

casts.ac_sta.description_md: Calculated actual station from observed lat and long

casts.order_occ.description_md: Order station was occupied (within each cruise)

casts.event_num.description_md: Event number; includes all research operations within each cruise (e.g. nets, CTD)

casts.cruz_leg.description_md: Leg of cruise, if multiple legs

casts.int_chl.units: milligrams chl per square meter per half light day
casts.int_chl.description_md: Integrated Chlorophyll per half light day

casts.int_c14.units: milligrams C per square meter per half light day
casts.int_c14.description_md: Integrated Primary Productivity per half light day

casts.geom.description_md: point geometry (WGS84) from lat_dec and lon_dec

casts.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid cell identifier from spatial join

grid.grid_key.description_md: Natural primary key (e.g. st60-ln80 or st60-ln80_hist for historical)

grid.station.description_md: Offshore component of CalCOFI coordinate system

grid.line.description_md: Alongshore component of CalCOFI coordinate system

grid.geom.description_md: Polygon geometry (WGS84 EPSG:4326) of grid cell

grid.geom_ctr.description_md: Point geometry (WGS84 EPSG:4326) of grid cell centroid

measurement_type.is_canonical.description_md: TRUE for canonical measurement types kept in ctd_thin and ctd_summary

measurement_type._source_column.description_md: original column name in wide-format CTD CSV

measurement_type._source_table.description_md: provenance: wide-format DuckDB table the measurement was pivoted from

measurement_type._source_datasets.description_md: provenance: semicolon-delimited list of datasets that produce this measurement type

measurement_type._qual_column.description_md: provenance: quality flag column name in source wide-format table (blank if none)

measurement_type._prec_column.description_md: provenance: precision column name in source wide-format table (blank if none)

ctd_cast.ctd_cast_uuid.description_md: PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (cruise_key, cast_key, cast_dir, datetime_start_utc)

ctd_cast.data_stage.description_md: data processing stage: final or preliminary

ctd_cast.cast_dir.description_md: cast direction: D=downcast (start time and start lat/lon) or U=upcast (time and lat/lon at first bottle tripped)

ctd_cast.ord_occ.description_md: order in which the station was occupied during the cruise (CalCOFI Ord_Occ)

ctd_cast.event_num.description_md: CTD-at-Depth event number from source CSV

ctd_cast.cast_key.description_md: cast identifier from source CSV (Cast_ID); composed of Study + Ord_Occ + up/downcast code

ctd_cast.datetime_start_utc.description_md: UTC timestamp parsed from date_time_utc string

ctd_cast.latitude.description_md: GPS decimal latitude; downcast = start latitude, upcast = latitude at first bottle tripped (CalCOFI Lat_Dec)

ctd_cast.longitude.description_md: GPS decimal longitude; downcast = start longitude, upcast = longitude at first bottle tripped (CalCOFI Lon_Dec)

ctd_cast.site_key.description_md: CalCOFI Line and Station composite key in the form "LLL.L SSS.S" (renamed from Sta_ID)

ctd_cast.cruise_key.description_md: cruise identifier in YYMMKK format; last 2 chars encode ship

ctd_cast.geom.description_md: point geometry (WGS84) from latitude and longitude

ctd_cast.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid cell identifier from spatial join

ctd_measurement.ctd_measurement_uuid.description_md: PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (ctd_cast_uuid, depth_m, measurement_type)

ctd_measurement.cruise_key.description_md: cruise identifier in YYYY-MM-NODC format; hive partition key

ctd_summary.ctd_summary_uuid.description_md: PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (cruise_key, site_key, depth_m, measurement_type)

ctd_summary.avg.description_md: mean measurement value across cast directions

ctd_thin.ctd_thin_uuid.description_md: PK: deterministic UUID v5 from (ctd_cast_uuid, depth_m, measurement_type)

ctd_thin.measurement_type.description_md: measurement type key; canonical types only (FK to measurement_type.measurement_type where is_canonical)

ctd_thin.measurement_value.description_md: numeric measurement value (exact copy from ctd_measurement; thinning selects rows, never interpolates)

ctd_thin.cast_dir.description_md: single retained direction per physical cast: D (downcast, preferred) or U (upcast, fallback)

ctd_thin.retained_reason.description_md: why this depth was kept: grid (on the ~10 m grid) or inflection (RDP-retained between grid nodes)

ctd_wide.data_stage.description_md: data processing stage: final or preliminary

ctd_wide.cast_dir.description_md: cast direction: D=downcast (start time, start lat/lon) or U=upcast (time, lat/lon at first bottle tripped)

ctd_wide.datetime_start_utc.description_md: date/time UTC; downcast=start time, upcast=time at first bottle tripped

ctd_wide.latitude.description_md: GPS decimal latitude; downcast=start lat, upcast=lat at first bottle tripped

ctd_wide.longitude.description_md: GPS decimal longitude; downcast=start lon, upcast=lon at first bottle tripped

ctd_wide.site_key.description_md: CalCOFI Line and Station composite key "LLL.L SSS.S" (renamed from Sta_ID)

ctd_wide.salt1_corr.description_md: primary salinity corrected against deep (>350 m) bottle salinities

ctd_wide.salt2_corr.description_md: secondary salinity corrected against deep bottle salinities

ctd_wide.ox1_cruise_corr.description_md: primary oxygen corrected using cruise-average regression vs bottle samples

ctd_wide.ox1_sta_corr.description_md: primary oxygen corrected using station-average regression vs bottle samples

ctd_wide.ox2_cruise_corr.description_md: secondary oxygen corrected using cruise-average regression

ctd_wide.ox2_sta_corr.description_md: secondary oxygen corrected using station-average regression

ctd_wide.ox1u_m.description_md: primary CTD oxygen in micromoles per kilogram

ctd_wide.est_chl_cruise_corr.description_md: estimated chlorophyll from cruise-corrected fluorometer regression (0-200 m)

ctd_wide.est_chl_sta_corr.description_md: estimated chlorophyll from station-corrected fluorometer regression (0-200 m)

ctd_wide.est_no3_cruise_corr.description_md: estimated nitrate from cruise-corrected ISUS regression vs bottle samples

ctd_wide.est_no3_sta_corr.description_md: estimated nitrate from station-corrected ISUS regression (~20 bottle samples per cast)

ctd_wide.sig_theta_ts1.description_md: potential density anomaly computed from Temp1 and Salt1

ctd_wide.sig_theta_ts2.description_md: potential density anomaly computed from Temp2 and Salt2

ctd_wide.ox_sat1.description_md: oxygen saturation computed from primary sensor

ctd_wide.ox_sat2.description_md: oxygen saturation computed from secondary sensor

ctd_wide.btl_depth.description_md: depth at which Niskin bottle was tripped

ctd_wide.ship_key.description_md: 2-char NODC ship code derived from cruise_key

phyllosoma_tow.tow_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per tow).

phyllosoma_tow.cruise_orig.description_md: Source cruise label (YYMM); cruise_key derived from it.

phyllosoma_tow.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Tow date as timestamp (date only; no time in source).

phyllosoma_tow.ship_key.description_md: NODC ship key; FK to ship.

phyllosoma_tow.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key from cruise_orig + ship + date.

phyto_measurement.measurement_value.description_md: Phytoplankton abundance, cells per liter (provisional units; Q02).

phyto_sample.phyto_sample_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per cruise x region composite).

phyto_sample.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC) matched by year-month; NULL where the month has multiple cruises (Q06).

phyto_taxon.species.description_md: Verbatim taxon name as given by the source.

phyto_taxon.aphia_id.description_md: Best-effort WoRMS AphiaID (accepted; partial coverage, Q05).

phyto_taxon.scientific_name_accepted.description_md: WoRMS accepted scientific name where matched.

region.region_key.description_md: Pooled-region code: NE, SE, Alley, or Offshore (primary key).

region.description.description_md: Region description (Northern Inshore, Southern Inshore, California Current, Central Pacific).

region.latitude.description_md: Provisional region centroid latitude (mean of member CalCOFI stations; Q01).

region.longitude.description_md: Provisional region centroid longitude (mean of member CalCOFI stations; Q01).

region.n_stations.description_md: Count of CalCOFI grid stations defining the region.

euphausiids_tow.tow_id.description_md: Source row identifier; primary key (one row = one euphausiid tow).

euphausiids_tow.ship_name.description_md: Vessel name as provided; resolved to ship_key against the NODC ship registry.

euphausiids_tow.cruise_orig.description_md: Original cruise label as provided (e.g. 'CALCOFI 5511B', 'CALCOFI 1504'); cruise_key is derived from this with ship + date.

euphausiids_tow.line.description_md: Alongshore component of the CalCOFI coordinate system.

euphausiids_tow.station.description_md: Offshore component of the CalCOFI coordinate system.

euphausiids_tow.region.description_md: Region label; constant 'All Regions' in this extract.

euphausiids_tow.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Tow start date-time (UTC); canonical event timestamp.

zoodb_measurement.measurement_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per sample x taxon x measurement_type).

zoodb_measurement.measurement_value.description_md: Abundance (count/1000m3 or count/m2) or carbon biomass (mg C/m2). 0 = analyzed-but-absent.

zoodb_sample.sample_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per ZooDB sample).

zoodb_sample.source.description_md: Sample grain: 'unpooled' (single net tow with full position) or 'pooled' (per-cruise regional composite of n_tows_pooled night tows).

zoodb_sample.cruise_orig.description_md: Original ZooDB cruise label (e.g. 'CALCOFI 5103', 'CALCOFI Monterey 5105', 'CALCOFI 1203SH'); cruise_key is derived from it.

zoodb_sample.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC) derived from cruise_orig + ship + date; NULL where unresolved (see questions).

zoodb_sample.ship_name.description_md: Vessel name as provided (unpooled only; 'N/A' for pooled); resolved to ship_key against the NODC ship registry.

zoodb_sample.ship_key.description_md: NODC ship code resolved from ship_name (unpooled only).

zoodb_sample.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Tow start date-time (unpooled only); cross-dataset match key to casts. Timezone unconfirmed (assumed local ship time, see questions).

zoodb_sample.site_key.description_md: CalCOFI station key 'LLL.L SSS.S' from line + station (unpooled only).

zoodb_sample.region.description_md: ZooDB region: SC (Southern California, lines 76.7-93), CC (Central California, lines 60-70), or Other (outside standard regions).

zoodb_sample.latitude.description_md: Latitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326); unpooled only.

zoodb_sample.longitude.description_md: Longitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326); unpooled only.

zoodb_sample.max_depth_m.description_md: Maximum tow depth in meters (unpooled only); CalCOFI standard 0-210 m since 1969, 0-140 m 1951-1968.

zoodb_sample.min_depth_m.description_md: Minimum tow depth in meters (unpooled only).

zoodb_sample.net_type.description_md: Net gear: CAL1MOBL (1-m ring net, to 1977), CALBOBL (0.71-m bongo, since Dec 1977), or '1 m' (unpooled only).

zoodb_sample.n_tows_pooled.description_md: Number of tows aggregated: 1 for unpooled, n for pooled composites.

zoodb_sample.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid-cell key assigned spatially (unpooled only).

zoodb_taxon.taxon_id.description_md: Sequential primary key for the higher-taxon lookup.

zoodb_taxon.taxon_zoodb.description_md: Verbatim ZooDB higher-taxon label (e.g. 'COPEPODA CALANOIDA CALANIDAE').

zoodb_taxon.taxon_slug.description_md: Lower-cased underscore join key derived from the ZooDB higher-taxon label; FK target from zoodb_measurement.

zoodb_taxon.aphia_id.description_md: WoRMS AphiaID for the resolved taxon concept.

zoodb_taxon.taxon_status.description_md: WoRMS status of the matched name (accepted / unaccepted).

zoodb_taxon.order_taxon.description_md: WoRMS order (column named order_taxon; 'order' is a SQL reserved word).

zooscan_measurement.measurement_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per sample x taxon x measurement_type).

zooscan_measurement.measurement_value.description_md: Abundance (No./m2), C biomass (mgC/m2), Feret diameter (mm), or individual C content (ugC). 0 = imaged-but-absent.

zooscan_sample.sample_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per ZooScan station tow).

zooscan_sample.cruise_orig.description_md: Original ZooScan cruise code (YYYYMM + 2-letter ship code, e.g. '200507NH' = Jul 2005, R/V New Horizon); cruise_key + ship_key are parsed from it.

zooscan_sample.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC), parsed as year-month (from the cruise code) + the NODC code of the resolved ship; NULL where unmatched to the cruise registry.

zooscan_sample.ship_key.description_md: NODC ship key parsed from the 2-letter suffix of the cruise code (e.g. NH=New Horizon, SR=Sally Ride).

zooscan_sample.ship_name.description_md: Vessel name from the ship registry.

zooscan_sample.site_key.description_md: CalCOFI station key 'LLL.L SSS.S' from line + station.

zooscan_sample.local_time_pst.description_md: Local (PST) clock time of the tow (HH:MM).

zooscan_sample.datetime_local_pst.description_md: Station date + local PST time of the tow.

zooscan_sample.day_night.description_md: Day or Night tow (by nautical twilight).

zooscan_taxon.taxon_id.description_md: Sequential primary key for the bioclass lookup.

zooscan_taxon.taxon_slug.description_md: Lower-cased ZooScan bioclass name; FK target from zooscan_measurement.

zooscan_taxon.aphia_id.description_md: WoRMS AphiaID for the resolved taxon concept; NULL for non-taxonomic classes.

zooscan_taxon.taxon_status.description_md: WoRMS status (accepted / unaccepted / non-taxonomic / not found).

zooscan_taxon.taxon_note.description_md: Notes on combined or non-taxonomic operational ZooScan classes.

zooscan_taxon.order_taxon.description_md: WoRMS order (column named order_taxon; 'order' is a SQL reserved word).

zooplankton_tow.ship_name.description_md: Name of ship used to collect the net-tow sample; resolved to ship_key.

zooplankton_tow.order_occ.description_md: SWFSC order occupied (populated for CalCOFI cruises).

zooplankton_tow.line.description_md: CalCOFI alongshore line (or Haul/Cycle for non-CalCOFI programs).

zooplankton_tow.station.description_md: CalCOFI offshore station (or Station/Net number for non-CalCOFI).

zooplankton_tow.date.description_md: Date the net-tow sample was collected.

zooplankton_tow.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Tow start date-time; canonical event timestamp.

zooplankton_tow.max_wire_out_m.description_md: Maximum meters of wire out for the net tow.

zooplankton_tow.net_type.description_md: Type of net used (e.g. CalBOBL, Cal1Mobl, Pairovet, Calvet, Manta, Neuston).

zooplankton_tow.tow_type.description_md: How the net was towed (e.g. Oblique, Horizontal, Vertical).

zooplankton_tow.site_key.description_md: CalCOFI station key in 'line station' form where line and station are numeric.

zooplankton_tow.tow_id.description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per tow, after the CalCOFI-bounding-box filter).

zooplankton_tow.ship_key.description_md: NODC ship key; FK to ship.

zooplankton_tow.cruise_key.description_md: Cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC); FK to cruise for CalCOFI tows.

zooplankton_tow.geom.description_md: Point geometry in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) from longitude/latitude.

zooplankton_tow.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid-cell key; FK to grid.

cufes_sample.cruise_orig.description_md: Source cruise label; cruise_key derived from it.

cufes_sample.sample_number.description_md: CUFES sample sequence number within the cruise.

cufes_sample.datetime_start_utc.description_md: Sample start date-time (UTC); canonical event timestamp.

cufes_sample.start_temperature.description_md: Sea surface temperature at sample start.

cufes_sample.start_salinity.description_md: Sea surface salinity at sample start.

cufes_sample.start_pump_speed.description_md: CUFES pump speed at sample start.

cufes_sample.stop_temperature.description_md: Sea surface temperature at sample end.

cufes_sample.stop_salinity.description_md: Sea surface salinity at sample end.

cufes_sample.stop_pump_speed.description_md: CUFES pump speed at sample end.

cufes_sample.ship_key.description_md: NODC ship key; FK to ship.

cufes_sample.cruise_key.description_md: CalCOFI cruise natural key, derived from cruise_orig + ship + date.

cufes_sample.grid_key.description_md: CalCOFI grid cell from spatial join.

cruise.cruise_uuid.description_md: CalCOFI species identifier, primary key in species table

cruise.cruise_key.description_md: Natural primary key in YYMMKK format (2-digit year + 2-digit month + ship_key)

ichthyo.ichthyo_uuid.description_md: Deterministic UUID v5 primary key derived from composite natural key (net_uuid, species_id, life_stage, measurement_type, measurement_value)

ichthyo.net_uuid.description_md: Foreign key to net table (source UUID)

ichthyo.measurement_type.description_md: Type of measurement: 'stage', 'size', or NULL for total count

ichthyo.measurement_value.description_md: Numeric value of measurement (stage number or length in mm)

invert.species_id.description_md: CalCOFI species identifier, primary key in species table

lookup.lookup_num.description_md: Numeric code for the lookup value

lookup.lookup_chr.description_md: Character code for the lookup value (e.g. YOLK, PREF)

lookup.description.description_md: Human-readable description of the lookup value

net.standard_haul_factor.description_md: Standard Haul Factor (SHF) used to adjust for variations in water volume filtered and tow depth, standardizing abundance to 10 m_ area integrated over the tow depth

net.volume_sampled.description_md: Volume of water sampled by the net (m^3)

net.prop_sorted.description_md: Proportion of the net sample that was sorted in the laboratory

segment.segment_id.description_md: Sequential integer primary key (sorted by time_beg)

site.order_occ.description_md: Order of station occupation within the cruise

site.longitude.description_md: Decimal degrees of longitude, in geographic coordinates (WGS84)

site.latitude.description_md: Decimal degrees of latitude, in geographic coordinates (WGS84)

site.line.description_md: Alongshore component of CalCOFI coordinate system for survey sites (https://proj.org/en/stable/operations/projections/calcofi.html)

site.station.description_md: Offshore component of CalCOFI coordinate system for survey sites (https://proj.org/en/stable/operations/projections/calcofi.html)

site.cruise_key.description_md: Denormalized natural key (propagated from cruise via cruise_uuid) for convenience queries

site.geom.description_md: Point geometry (WGS84 EPSG:4326) created from longitude and latitude

site.grid_key.description_md: Foreign key to grid table (assigned via spatial intersection)

species.itis_id.description_md: ITIS Taxonomic Serial Number (TSN) for this species; derived via local spp.duckdb lookup

species.worms_id.description_md: WoRMS AphiaID (accepted) for this species; derived via local spp.duckdb lookup

species.gbif_id.description_md: GBIF Backbone Taxonomy key for this species; derived via local spp.duckdb lookup

taxa_rank.taxonRank.description_md: Taxonomic rank name (e.g. Kingdom; Species). Primary key.

taxa_rank.rank_order.description_md: Integer sort order from broadest (1=Kingdom) to most specific

taxon.taxonID.description_md: Integer identifier within the authority (AphiaID for WoRMS; TSN for ITIS). Compound PK with authority.

taxon.acceptedNameUsageID.description_md: ID of the leaf (species-level) taxon this hierarchy row was built from

taxon.parentNameUsageID.description_md: ID of the immediate parent taxon in the hierarchy

taxon.scientificName.description_md: Scientific name at this taxonomic rank

taxon.taxonRank.description_md: Taxonomic rank (e.g. Kingdom; Phylum; Class; Order; Family; Genus; Species). FK to taxa_rank.

taxon.scientificNameAuthorship.description_md: Authority string for the scientific name

cruise_summary.ship_name.description_md: Ship name as resolved against NODC ship registry.

cruise_summary.ichthyo.description_md: Distinct sites sampled by SWFSC ichthyo on this cruise.

cruise_summary.bottle.description_md: Distinct sites sampled by CalCOFI bottle casts on this cruise.

cruise_summary.ctd_cast.description_md: Distinct sites sampled by CTD casts on this cruise.

cruise_summary.dic.description_md: Distinct sites with NCEI DIC samples on this cruise.

_spatial.layer.description_md: Spatial layer slug from metadata/spatial_layers.csv (e.g. ca_county_boundaries).

_spatial.feature_id.description_md: Stable feature identifier within the layer.

r_salinity_sva.description: Reported Specific Volume Anomaly (pre-QC); WARNING: different parameter/scale than salinity PSS-78

dry_air_temp.description: Dry air temperature from sling psychrometer

wet_air_temp.description: Wet air temperature from sling psychrometer

euphausiid_abundance.description: Euphausiid (krill) abundance per net tow. PROVISIONAL: units and taxonomic scope unconfirmed (see questions Q01, Q02).

zooplankton_abundance.description: Zooplankton numerical abundance (volumetric density) per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected for net type).

zooplankton_abundance_areal.description: Zooplankton areal abundance (depth-integrated density) per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected).

zooplankton_biomass_carbon.description: Zooplankton carbon biomass per net tow, by higher taxon. Raw (uncorrected for net type).

zooscan_abundance.description: Zooplankton areal abundance from ZooScan optical imaging, by image-classified bioclass.

zooscan_biomass_carbon.description: Estimated zooplankton carbon biomass from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.

zooscan_feret_diameter.description: Mean Feret diameter (organism size) from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.

zooscan_carbon_individual.description: Mean individual carbon content from ZooScan optical imaging, by bioclass.
